title: Cute & Realism Bee
description: A Minecraft bee redesign that makes them a bit more like real life bees but cute!
body:
Minecraft bees are sooo cute! This resource pack offers you a new design of minecraft bees with more shapes and a slightly less saturated color palette.


# Screenshots
For Tiny Takeover updates: one adult bee with two baby bees
![One adult bee with two baby bees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c123faed1d97125708264768d59d5d483d0f939e.jpeg)
Bees
![Bee flying across a cherry blossom tree.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47870fc68fbcf863e76b3136845b66f7dd297f1e_0.webp)
![Bee looking at you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b095b745d63166ff25791a98f80d26b86d2747_0.webp)
![Bee flying in the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a30a4097f04f16e26f7ae3c8004a09da8e3b3a22_0.webp)


# Requirements
This pack requires

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

\- or -

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
and
[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)


# Compatibility
This pack is compatible with [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) with a custom minimap icon for the bees.
